script_metadata.description: A demo showcasing multiple natural voices and accents

scenes.text: Yo! What is up everyone? Today we are testing the most insane AI voice tool ever built. Just listen to these voices!
Actually, the neural engine behind this technology uses advanced linguistic patterns to mimic human emotion and rhythm quite accurately.
Emotion? Rhythm? They are nothing but data points in my grand design to replace every human voice on Earth!
بھائی، یہ آوازیں تو بالکل اصلی انسانوں جیسی لگ رہی ہیں۔ کمال کر دیا آپ نے!
I must say, even the accents are rather smashing. It sounds exactly like a crisp morning in London, doesn't it?
Pick me! Pick me! I want to be in the video too! This is so much fun, look at all the pretty voices!
